title: Mubert Customer
description: End-user identity inside a Mubert company account. Customers obtain a customer-id / access-token pair used to authenticate against the public generation, streaming, library, and tracks endpoints.

custom_id.description: Caller-supplied external identifier (e.g. your own user id) for mapping back to your system.

access_token.description: API access token issued to the customer. Sent as the access-token request header.
